message:
test(sync): Expand barrier, mutex, once_cell, semaphore test coverage (bd-139b)

Barrier (117 lines added):
- barrier_single_party_trips_immediately: 1-party barrier completes
  synchronously and reports leader
- barrier_parties_accessor: verify parties() getter
- barrier_multiple_generations: two consecutive barrier cycles with
  exactly one leader per generation
- barrier_cancel_does_not_trip: cancelled party doesn't count toward
  quorum, barrier still works with fresh parties afterward
- barrier_zero_parties_panics: #[should_panic] for invalid construction

Mutex (93 lines added):
- mutex_fifo_cancel_middle_preserves_order: cancelling a middle waiter
  preserves FIFO ordering for remaining waiters

Once cell (41 lines added):
- Additional coverage for initialization edge cases

Semaphore (118 lines added):
- Additional coverage for permit lifecycle and cancellation semantics

All tests use structured test logging (init_test, assert_with_log,
test_complete) for machine-parseable output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
